class.name: yasmin_ros/TfBufferState
class.description: Create a tf2 buffer and transform listener and store them in the blackboard.

class.name: yasmin_ros/RosSerializeCppState
class.description: Serialize a C++ ROS interface instance into bytes.

class.name: yasmin_ros/RosDeserializeCppState
class.description: Deserialize bytes into a C++ ROS interface instance.
